case_title: GATEWAY PROPERTY MANAGEMENT vs. PARKER, EDNA et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE: JOSEPH DESMOND; CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR: PATTY DOWLING C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL AND DEFT EDNA PARKER PRESENT WITH HER COUNSEL. OTHER DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLFF; ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY DEFT. JUDGMENT FOR PLFF FOR $4390, PAYABALE W/IN 10 DAYS FROM THIS DATE. IF DEFT FAILS, JUDGMENT SHIFTS AND PLFF WILL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES,FORFEITURE OF LEASE AND COST OF SUIT. PREVAILING PARTY WILL BE THE DEFT IF AMOUNT IS PAID WITHIN THE 10 DAYS AND COST CAN BE RECOVERED, OTHERWISE, PLAINTIFF WILL BE THE PREVAILING PARTY. DEFT. TO PREPARE THE ORDER.
